name: Decopins -Asset Fighters Series-
short_description: "Dedopin" is a traditional Japanese "Flick" action to express friendliness. *"Deco" means forehead and "pin" is flick action.Flick, flick. Click, click. Decopins is a tower defense like game with simple action. Don't let Donuts escape from your donuts shop by your Decopin!
detailed_description:
"Decopin" is a traditional Japanese "Flick" action to express friendliness.

Flick, flick, flick... Click, click, click... Decopins is a tower defense like game with simple action. Don't let Donuts escape from your donuts shop by clicking and Magic. 20 stages, Hell/Death mode and bonus stage. Level up your Decopin skill and make full use of MAGIC.

Don't think difficult. Just clicking and clicking Donuts!!

*"Decopin" means Flick or Click in Japanese.

*Don't do Decopin or use Magic in real world, thankyou.

*Gamepad(XInput), Mouse and Keyboard controls are supported.

*Mouse aiming is more confortable.

*Decopins2 will be launched on Jan, 2024.

-Credits:

Music:

"Cassette Tape Dream" Main Music, Sharou

"Gentle Distance" Stage Over, Anonyment

"Old Blood" Stage 15, Kohrogi

"Funk Style" Inventry Music, Phalene

"Automata" Stage 20, Low

"Acogi POP" Chill Out Infinity, Br'z

"FUNK JAZZ FUSION Fu" Hell Mode, Keisuke Ito

"Chill the sun", STAGE 5, Tagord

SE: Koukaon-Labo

Thankyou for Fanstasic Musics, Fantastic SE, Fantastic 3D Assets and All Players!
